name: Haunt
description: A location with a strong connection to the Underworld serving as the krewe's base. Rated in Utility (usefulness as a base), Fluidity (how easily it shifts), and Residue (extra Plasm per dot at session start). Multiple krewe members may pool dots toward a shared Haunt.

name: Memento
description: A death-charged ritual object tied to the Underworld. Types: Memorabilia (●, personal death-resonant objects), Charms (●●, minor power objects), Vanitas (●●●, artistic death-objects), Fetters (●●●●, bound to a specific ghost), and Deathmarks (●●●●, body modifications). Each type grants distinct benefits.
